bird.name: 紅尾鸚鵡
bird.summary: 紅尾鸚鵡（Amazona brasiliensis），又名紅尾亞馬遜鸚鵡或紅尾亞馬遜鸚哥，是一種鸚鵡。牠們是巴西東南部聖保羅州及巴拉那州海岸區的特有種。牠們受到失去棲息地及被捕獵作寵物等威脅，被世界自然保護聯盟列為易危。於1991年至1992年，估計牠們只有少於2000隻。隨著…

locations.name: Serra do Mar coastal forests
locations.summary: The Serra do Mar coastal forests is an ecoregion of the tropical moist forests biome.

relations.subject: 紅尾鸚鵡
relations.evidence: It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests

relations.subject: 紅尾鸚鵡
relations.evidence: The bird has been threatened by habitat loss and capture for the wild bird trade, and is a symbol of the efforts to conserve one of the Earth's most biologically diverse ecosystems
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
